title: Tanya project-level forbidden patterns
description: Schema for .tanya/forbidden-patterns.json. Each pattern is a regex that fails the post-write gate when matched in a file.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier used in validation issues.

pattern.description: Regex (without delimiters) tested against the file's full text content.

filePattern.description: Regex matched against the relative file path. Patterns only run on files that match.

excludeFilePattern.description: Regex matched against the relative file path. Patterns are skipped on files that match.

message.description: Human-readable message shown when the pattern fires. Be specific about why this is forbidden and what to do instead.
